who: restaurant owners processing 5–15 liquor license applications/month
offer: For restaurant owners processing 5–15 liquor license applications/month, the complexity of paperwork causes delays in opening. We automate the application generation instead of manual application processes and paperwork.
problem: Complexity and time consumption in generating liquor license applications.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant owners
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to restaurant owners with demo video
Join community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try template-based application generation and status tracking for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Offer one-click export of simple reports
